So they have visibility over what's going to be published.
And he was curious how many we would be publishing per week.

but, uh, yeah.

about regarding images for them.

you.

So, and I think especially in like industries like recruiting, there are a lot of...
tools that have supposed AI features.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss updates and progress on various client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SentinelOne aiming for mid-October launch; need to plan CVE page publishing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Multiple new client projects (LightSource, Base10, CodeRabbit) kicked off; generating artifacts this week](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Ongoing progress with existing clients (Remcus, Lovable, Logic, Otto, HyperExponential, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Team capacity and task allocation discussed for various projects](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Topics

### SentinelOne Project Update

  - [Mid-October launch target](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Need plan for CVE pages: quantity per year, publishing rate](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Using SEMrush for CVE-related keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Aiming for programmatic publishing via Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Katya to consult on safe publishing rate (100/week previously used)](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

### New Client Kickoffs

  - [LightSource, Base10, CodeRabbit started yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Generating artifacts this week for all three](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Product deep dives pending for most; CodeRabbit less enthusiastic about engagement](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Remcus Project

  - [Meeting later today to present initial clusters](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Focus on BES (Business Email Security) priority](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Clusters built around core service areas (compliance, audits, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)

### Lovable Project

  - [Aida working on content OS and generating assignments](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Marcel leading discussion in upcoming sync](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Logic Project

  - [Meeting today to present and approve assignments](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Erik to address LinkedIn content support request](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

### Otto Project

  - [Tamara working on assignments](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Kavishka to create Loom video on exporting/uploading assignments to Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)

### HyperExponential Project

  - [Waiting for introduction to head of design for Framer implementation](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Erik to follow up on connecting with dev team](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### DeepGram Project

  - [Content audit in progress using Google Search Console and SEMrush data](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [30 new assignments approved](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Ramping up content production: 1 article this week, 2-3 next week, aiming for 5/week](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

### HockeyStack Project

  - [Client has left the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Final tasks: resolving comments on feature matrix](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Katya: Obtain SEMrush access for keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Erik: Review LightSource YouTube video and prepare questions](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Tamara: Generate artifacts for LightSource and other new clients](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Aida: Review Ife's calibration blog for HyperExponential](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [Erik: Follow up on connecting with HyperExponential's design team](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Bailey: Join internal channels for HyperExponential and Relay, familiarize with projects](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Aida: Complete content audit for DeepGram by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Kavishka: Finish remaining two blogs for HockeyStack](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Katya: Message Simran for Understory blog progress update](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [All: Ensure competitor research is thorough when creating listicle content](https://fathom.video/share/gUxpvAbnkSqxbKhXv6ai6w6zyCmee5jJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

action_items.description: Ask in IT chat for priority SEMrush access; explain Andy absence, need for pod assignment
Decide + assign CM for Base 10 account
Review LightSource YouTube video; prepare questions for async deep dive
Generate artifacts for LightSource based on video content
Follow up w/ Base 10 if no response to "what we heard" by EOD
Follow up w/ David re: intro to HyperExponential head of design for Framer implementation
Review HyperExponential calibration blog today before tomorrow's call
Complete HyperExponential calibration blog by EOD
Join internal channels for HyperExponential and Relay; review calibration blogs
Compile DeepGram audit (GSC + SEMrush + lead data) by EOW; use ChatGPT for VLOOKUP help
Complete second HockeyStack blog (first one ready for review)
Message Simran in Understory internal channel re: blog progress
Follow up w/ Natalie re: Understory calibration blog staging
